shared_properties: Forward lens cone and gold housing silhouette.
differences: Adds a short rail carriage under the housing.
Core pulse sweeps through a wider amber arc.
Outer signal rim includes motion marks on the rear edge.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle on rail light entities and reuse the fixed emitter beam code while the Transform moves along a path.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_moving_light_emitter_32x32.png through AssetServer and swap it onto moving emitter entities that follow authored rail points.
runtime_notes: Sweep loop runs at 8 fps while the rail mover updates position in FixedUpdate.
Lens center stays at x=24 y=16 to preserve beam origin compatibility with the fixed emitter code path.
Motion marks must remain readable without creating false beam width cues.

context.usage: Rail mounted beam source that sweeps danger across platforms and forces time based traversal through temporary shadow lanes.

shape.silhouette: Lamp housing on a short rail carriage with a wider pulse arc and small motion marks trailing the mount.

specs.texture: Metal rail carriage and bright glass lens with a warmer pulse than the fixed emitter.
specs.shading: White hot lens center with amber sweep halo and darker rail undercarriage.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x32 px with eight 32x32 frames.
Rail carriage remains inside the lower 8 px of the frame on all eight frames.
Motion marks never extend past the 32 px frame edge and do not alter the beam origin point.
